title: 10 best herbal teas for hypothyroidism
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas helps with hypothyroidism because it supports the adrenal glands, which regulate thyroid function. The active compound glycyrrhizin in licorice root tea has anti-inflammatory properties, reducing oxidative stress that can contribute to thyroid dysfunction. Additionally, glycyrrhizin has been shown to stimulate the production of thyroid hormones and increase the activity of the enzyme responsible for converting inactive thyroid hormones into their active forms, t...
